meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use AI-driven onboarding to overcome the 'no portfolio' trap. An intermediate guide using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship high-end features.
content.answer_block: You don't need a massive portfolio; you need a high-converting onboarding experience. By building a sophisticated, interactive 'Product Tour' or 'Feature Walkthrough' using AI-assisted tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you demonstrate technical mastery and immediate value, turning your lack of history into a showcase of modern, intelligent engineering.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the freelancer’s greatest enemy. You have the skills, but without a polished portfolio, clients see a void where they should see a vision. The 'no portfolio' trap isn't a lack of talent; it's a lack of perceived velocity. When you can't show past work, you must show current intent through high-fidelity, interactive experiences.

Today, we stop building static sites and start engineering user-centric onboarding flows. By leveraging the combined power of Antigravity’s architectural scaffolding and Claude Code’s rapid implementation, you will create a professional, interactive feature that proves your value to any client in under an hour. It’s time to stop waiting for permission and start building your authority.

steps.title: Define the Onboarding Architecture
steps.description: Establish a modular state machine for your onboarding flow to ensure scalability and ease of client handoff.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a modular, state-managed onboarding component using React and Framer Motion. Include three distinct steps: Welcome, Feature Highlight, and Call-to-Action. Ensure the component is accessible and uses CSS variables for easy theming.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate a React onboarding state machine with Framer Motion transitions'

steps.title: Build the Interactive Tour Overlay
steps.description: Implement a spotlight-effect overlay that guides users through key UI elements, demonstrating your ability to manipulate the DOM.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Develop an interactive 'Spotlight' component that darkens the background and highlights a target DOM element. Include a tooltip positioned dynamically based on the target element's bounding client rect.

steps.title: Integrate Progress Tracking Logic
steps.description: Add persistent progress tracking so your onboarding feels like a premium SaaS product rather than a simple popup.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a custom hook useOnboardingProgress that persists the user's current step in localStorage and provides a progress percentage for a header bar.

steps.title: Style with Professional Design Tokens
steps.description: Apply a cohesive design system to ensure the onboarding flow looks like it was built by a senior team.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a set of design tokens including primary brand colors, spacing, and typography scales. Apply these to the onboarding components using Tailwind CSS classes.

steps.title: Unit Test the Onboarding Flow
steps.description: Ensure reliability by testing the state transitions, proving to clients that you ship production-ready, bug-free code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write Jest unit tests for the onboarding state machine, verifying that state transitions correctly on 'next' and 'back' button clicks.

pro_tips: Always wrap your onboarding logic in a Feature Flag so the client can toggle it off without a full deployment.
Use micro-animations for every transition; they increase the perceived value of your code by 300%.
Include a 'Skip' button that saves the user's preference to the database to track drop-off rates.
Use CSS-in-JS or Tailwind to keep your onboarding styles isolated from the main application's global scope.
Document your code using JSDoc; clients appreciate clean, self-documenting codebases more than fancy design.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, record a 60-second screen-share video of the component in action and add it to your LinkedIn featured section as a 'Live Demo'.
content.conversion_block: Stop chasing clients with a PDF resume and start closing them with live, interactive proof of your technical expertise. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
